experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.summary: Leading development of next-generation web platform serving 500k+ users globally.
highlights: Architected microservices infrastructure handling 1M+ daily requests
Reduced page load time by 60% through performance optimization
Led team of 5 engineers in agile environment
Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 10 minutes

experiences.title: Full-Stack Developer

highlights: Built 15+ responsive web applications using React and Next.js
Implemented real-time features using WebSocket technology
Mentored 3 junior developers and established code review practices
Achieved 98% test coverage across critical modules

experiences.title: Junior Developer

highlights: Developed frontend components using React and Redux
Implemented REST APIs with Node.js and Express

experiences.title: Freelance Web Developer
